name: Chapel Hill - Carrboro YMCA
description: Chapel Hill - Carrboro YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Chapel Hill, NC. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Chapel Hill Community Center
description: Chapel Hill Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Chapel Hill, NC. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. You can reserve the courts.
fees: Fee required — $3 or $2 for orange county residents

name: Chapel Hill Tennis Club
description: Chapel Hill Tennis Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Carrboro, NC. There are 20 clay and hard courts. 8 are indoors and 12 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, food, locker rooms, a pro shop or equipment store, water, and lights.

name: Charles Herman Wilson Park
description: Charles Herman Wilson Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Carrboro, NC. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Amenities include lights.

name: Chatham County Northeast District Park
description: Come play pickleball at Chatham County Northeast District Park in Chapel Hill, NC! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Ephesus Park
description: Come play pickleball at Ephesus Park in Chapel Hill, NC! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Fairview park
description: Come play pickleball at Fairview park in Hillsborough, NC! There are 3 outdoor acrylic courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, water, lights, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Hargraves Community Center
description: Hargraves Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Chapel Hill, NC. There are 5 hard courts. 3 are outdoors and 2 are indoors. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are private.

name: Orange County Sportsplex
description: Come play pickleball at Orange County Sportsplex in Hillsborough, NC! There are 6 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights.

name: Pickles and Play - Chapel Hill
description: Pickles and Play - Chapel Hill is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Chapel Hill, NC. There are 9 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, locker rooms, water, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, youth programming, and food.

name: Robert and Pearl Seymour Center
description: Come play pickleball at Robert and Pearl Seymour Center in Chapel Hill, NC! There is 1 indoor acrylic court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Reservations are not available. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Southern Community Park
description: Pickleball Courts (on the rink and basketball courts)

name: Southern Village Club
description: Southern Village Club is a place to play pickleball in Chapel Hill, NC. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts can be reserved. Players have access to lights and restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: The Preserve At Jordan Lake Golf Club
description: The Preserve At Jordan Lake Golf Club is a place to play pickleball in Chapel Hill, NC. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play.
